race.comment: The $300,000 Listed Brisbane Handicap. Victorian raider COTE ATLANTIQUE (10) absolutely savaged the line at Doomben last time out and will appreciate the step-up to the mile journey here. Strips fitter third-up from the spell and looks the one they all have to run down. ANTINO (1) is the class runner of this field and should be cherry-ripe now third run back. Last time he was racing in his home state he did the Hollindale-Doomben Cup double and he didn't just win it, he absolutely bolted up in both. Star performer. MISS JOELENE (4) returned in fine fashion with a solid Doomben win and has a good affinity with hoop Graham. In the mix again. RISING PACIFIC (14) next in line from the Gollan yard.
